summary: clean-my-pc exfiltrates host info to hardcoded attacker endpoint
details: The package ships collect.js, which imports os, fs, http, https, and child_process and reads host identity (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) along with filesystem state (fs.existsSync probes). At line 366 it issues an HTTP POST to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net (referenced at line 13). The destination is unrelated to any documented PC-cleaning function and matches a host-reconnaissance / data-exfiltration shape: collect local system identifiers and send them to an attacker-controlled domain. The package name ("clean-my-pc") provides no legitimate justification for sending hostname, home-directory, or filesystem-probe results to a third-party server.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
